title: Remain Conscious
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{ForcePower |image= |name=Remain Conscious |alternate= |alignment= |area=Control[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] |purpose=Allowed the individual to resist falling unconscious when incapacitated |inventor= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Looks like the kid bought it."
"Oooraraargh (whimper)."
"(weakly) Don't count on it.|Han Solo, Chewbacca and Luke Skywalker|}} '''Remain Conscious''' was a [[Force power/Legends#Control|Control-based]] [[The Force/Legends|Force]] ability which allowed a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|force-user]] to fight off damage effects that would knock out a normal individual. ==Description== A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force user]] could use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to Remain Conscious after being incapacitated through injury or some other means. However, they were severely limited in the actions that they could perform, sometimes only capable of performing one task before lapsing into unconsciousness. Force users who were able to use [[Control Pain]] to suppress the effects of the injury after using Remain Conscious could continue to function without being knocked out. ==Users== *[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|11|The Most Dangerous Foe|reprint=1}} {{Mo}} *''[[Domain of Evil]]'' {{Reprint|Domain of Evil}} *{{JournalCite|12|Idol Intentions}}
